title: Category:Ruud Jacobs
text: Ruud Jacobs (1975) [1] Ruud Jacobs , (May 3, 1938 – July 18, 2019) was a Dutch contrabassist and producer. References [ edit ] ↑ Image from Jules de Corte krijgt Louis Davidsprijs van Louis van Dijk in Amstelveen; Rogier van Otterloo, Ruud Jacobs, Jules de Corte en Louis van Dijk by Hans Peters / Anefo , Nationaal Archief , Wikimedia Commons
